item.title: トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢 ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじ…
item.author: にゃんこ耳 (@oueitokiwazu.bsky.social)
item.description:
トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢

ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじゃないね。

#家庭菜園
item.content:encoded:
トマトの皮が、長雨で弾けちゃって、これだけ😢

ガーキン(ミニきゅうり)は、昨日収穫しとけば良かった……欲は出すもんじゃないね。

#家庭菜園

item.title: トルコ旅行、ダンナとワタクシで意見が割れてる😅 ダンナ……ギョベクリテペ再訪、ぽんぽんぴーぴーで行けなかったガジアン…
item.author: にゃんこ耳 (@oueitokiwazu.bsky.social)
item.description:
トルコ旅行、ダンナとワタクシで意見が割れてる😅

ダンナ……ギョベクリテペ再訪、ぽんぽんぴーぴーで行けなかったガジアンテプのモザイク博物館へ行きたい。

ワタクシ……トラブゾン、リゼからアララト山近く〜ヴァン湖(ヴァン猫)に行きたい。

トルコの東側なのは一致してるけど、北か南かで揉めてる😅
item.content:encoded:
トルコ旅行、ダンナとワタクシで意見が割れてる😅

ダンナ……ギョベクリテペ再訪、ぽんぽんぴーぴーで行けなかったガジアンテプのモザイク博物館へ行きたい。

ワタクシ……トラブゾン、リゼからアララト山近く〜ヴァン湖(ヴァン猫)に行きたい。

トルコの東側なのは一致してるけど、北か南かで揉めてる😅

item.title: 7月6日（月） #momoポートレート 5月の或る日 【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭 清々しい…
item.author: 桃猫momoneko (@momonekofold.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月6日（月）

#momoポートレート

5月の或る日
【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭

清々しい朝のﾊﾞﾝｺｸ
ﾎﾃﾙの朝食・ﾚｽﾄﾗﾝ、眺めも😄👌
（8枚目は桃猫を探せ!）

LuxuryにActiveにそして
Culture Discoveryな旅でした
ﾊﾞﾝｺｸでは日本企業の進出による
街の活気を感じる一方で
寺院では静かに手を合わせ
寄付をする人々の姿が
印象に残りました

┈

《question ⁉︎》

この旅でのﾊﾞﾝｺｸの気温は…⁈🤔

①36度
②34度
③31度
④29度
⑤その他

@bskyphotos.bsky.social
#写真好きな人と繋がりたい
item.content:encoded:
7月6日（月）

#momoポートレート

5月の或る日
【momoneko in Bangkok】🇹🇭

清々しい朝のﾊﾞﾝｺｸ
ﾎﾃﾙの朝食・ﾚｽﾄﾗﾝ、眺めも😄👌
（8枚目は桃猫を探せ!）

LuxuryにActiveにそして
Culture Discoveryな旅でした
ﾊﾞﾝｺｸでは日本企業の進出による
街の活気を感じる一方で
寺院では静かに手を合わせ
寄付をする人々の姿が
印象に残りました

┈

《question ⁉︎》

この旅でのﾊﾞﾝｺｸの気温は…⁈🤔

①36度
②34度
③31度
④29度
⑤その他

@bskyphotos.bsky.social
#写真好きな人と繋がりたい

item.title: ".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipal…
item.author: Oliver (@oliver48.bsky.social)
item.description:
".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipality in Canada to officially recognize trees as living beings with inherent rights ... declaring that trees deserve protection, including the right to life, natural growth, integrity, and regeneration"
www.facebook.com/groups/29053...
item.content:encoded:
".. the small Quebec town ... has become the first municipality in Canada to officially recognize trees as living beings with inherent rights ... declaring that trees deserve protection, including the right to life, natural growth, integrity, and regeneration"
www.facebook.com/groups/29053...

item.title: “After it ended, the Belgian team’s social media account had…
item.author: Brent Toderian (@brenttoderian.bsky.social)

Perfect.

item.title: Look at this magnificent owldeer created in Procreate by Kat…
item.author: Beautiful Bizarre Magazine (@beautifulbizarre.net)
item.description:
Look at this magnificent owldeer created in Procreate by Katyani Jaswal! This hand drawn animation has been created frame by frame. We love the time and effort that has gone in to creating such a wonderful piece of art ✨

#beautifulbizarre #art #digitalart #procreate
item.content:encoded:
Look at this magnificent owldeer created in Procreate by Katyani Jaswal! This hand drawn animation has been created frame by frame. We love the time and effort that has gone in to creating such a wonderful piece of art ✨

#beautifulbizarre #art #digitalart #procreate

item.title: The Cape Verde national football team given a heroes' welcom…
item.author: Acid Rain (@bearysweet.bsky.social)
item.description:
The Cape Verde national football team given a heroes' welcome back in Praia after their historic run in the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

Cape Verde became the smallest nation by population to ever reach the knockout stage of the tournament, all without having a single yellow card rescinded.

#worldcup
item.content:encoded:
The Cape Verde national football team given a heroes' welcome back in Praia after their historic run in the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

Cape Verde became the smallest nation by population to ever reach the knockout stage of the tournament, all without having a single yellow card rescinded.

#worldcup

item.title: You'll never believe what former Speaker of the House Kevin …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
You'll never believe what former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy just said on national television... with a straight face.

Yeah... I'm just going to leave this here for the people who care about the facts.
item.content:encoded:
You'll never believe what former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy just said on national television... with a straight face.

Yeah... I'm just going to leave this here for the people who care about the facts.

item.title: Belgium cruised to a 4-1 win against the U.S. on Monday. It …
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Belgium cruised to a 4-1 win against the U.S. on Monday. It will face Spain on Friday in Los Angeles in the quarterfinals.
item.content:encoded: Belgium cruised to a 4-1 win against the U.S. on Monday. It will face Spain on Friday in Los Angeles in the quarterfinals.
